steps.t: Hasna has asked you to pick leafy vines from trellises. However, you must avoid being spotted by gardeners more than a few times. The trellises can be…
You have gathered many leafy vines. You should bring them back to Hasna at the Dahâl Huliz.
Hasna is too nervous to give Phêrida Iron-edge the vine circlet and has asked you to go instead. Phêrida can be found at the Dahâl Huliz.
